raw_responses.title: The pyriform egg of the Common Murre is more stable on sloping surfaces (Auk 2018)
raw_responses.snippet: Common Murre eggs more stable than Razorbill; more pyriform ⇒ more stable on slope; selection favors pyriform shape on slope.

raw_responses.title: The point of a Guillemot's egg (BOU, Birkhead)
raw_responses.snippet: Roll-arc of pyriform egg is wider than most cliff ledges so not roll-stop; stability from long straight contact-edge increasing friction.

raw_responses.title: Egg shape in Common Guillemot Uria aalge and Brunnich's Guillemot U. lomvia: not a rolling matter?
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain study of pyriform-egg evolutionary stability.

raw_responses.title: Geometry-Aligned LLM Fine-Tuning for Sequential Narrow-Opening Planning
raw_responses.snippet: Failure-driven training loop with deterministic geometric verifier returning failing waypoint indices and violation types (boundary, collision, swept collision, step-size); LoRA-based SFT to keep solutions in workspace.

raw_responses.title: AsFT: Anchoring Safety During LLM Fine-Tuning Within Narrow Safety Basin
raw_responses.snippet: Parameter space as narrow safety basin; constrains update directions; penalizes updates orthogonal to alignment direction.

raw_responses.title: SafeConstellations: Steering LLM Safety to Reduce Over-Refusals Through Task-Specific Trajectory
raw_responses.snippet: Steer LLM safety with task-specific trajectories to reduce over-refusals.

raw_responses.title: LLM-Enabled Low-Altitude UAV Natural Language Navigation
raw_responses.snippet: LLM selects repair modes for constraint conflicts; safety constraints never relaxed.

raw_responses.title: A Comprehensive Dataset for Enhancing Safety in LLM (EMNLP 2025)
